title: coryphantha vivipara
intro: Coryphantha vivipara, also known as the "living rock cactus," is a species of cactus in the family Cactaceae that is native to the southwestern United States and northern Mexico. This plant has been used for centuries in traditional medicine due to its medicinal properties, including its ability to inhibit the growth of bacteria and fungi, which makes it effective in treating wounds and infections. The health benefits of coryphantha vivipara include its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which can help to reduce swelling and promote healing in the body. In herbal preparations, coryphantha vivipara is often used to make salves, tinctures, and teas that can be applied topically or taken internally to support overall health and well-being.
